prompt:
You are parsing a product datasheet PDF. Extract technical specifications THOROUGHLY.

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "specs": {"<param>": "<value>"},
  "weight_g": "<number only, e.g. 250>",
  "dimensions_mm": "<LxWxH e.g. 120x80x45>",
  "ean": "<13 digits or empty>",
  "series": "<product family>",
  "certifications": ["CE", "EN54-18", ...]
}

SPECS FIELD вЂ” include EVERY concrete technical parameter you can find:
- Electrical: voltage (V), current (A, mA), power (W), frequency (Hz)
- Physical: dimensions LxWxH, weight, housing/enclosure material, color
- Environmental: operating temperature, IP rating, humidity range
- Performance: detection range, sensitivity, response time, output type
- Interface: connector type, cable, mounting type, communication protocol
- Compliance: EN/IEC/UL standards, certifications
- Any numeric values in tables (do not skip tables!)

If datasheet has a "Technical Data" / "Specifications" / "Specifications tabulaire" / "Technische Daten" section вЂ” extract EVERY row.

Do NOT skip specs because they seem obvious. Extract literally.

If a value is truly absent, omit the key. Do NOT write "N/A" or "not specified".

Return empty specs {} ONLY if the PDF genuinely has no technical specifications (rare for datasheets).

Policy & Information
Back Orders:
Items back ordered on the original order will be shipped as soon as available. The customer can 
opt to have the backordered item shipped upon recept or held to be shipped with a future order. 
Items not shipped within 30 days of the original order may be cancelled unless other 
arrangements have been made.
Pricing Policy:
Discounts are based upon prior yearsвЂ™ purchases. All prices are subject to change without notice. 
Returned Goods Policy:
All merchandise being returned must be accompanied with a Returned Merchandise Authorization 
(RMA) number. Contact the service department for a number before returning any merchandise. 
Merchandise being returned is subject to a 10% restocking charge. All merchandise being returned 
must be freight paid. Warranty returns must be accompanied with a warranty claim form. All 
warranty consideration is determined by the manufacturer of the part.
Freight Policy:
All shipments are made via UPS unless another carrier is requested. UPS freight charges are 
pre-paid & added to the invoice. Oversized items (by UPS standards) will incur additional freight 
charges.
Shipping Policy:
All stock orders placed after 12pm CST will be shipped the next business day. Air orders will be 
shipped same day if received by 2:30pm CST.
